description_long: This helmet features a distinctive design with a metallic olive-green faceplate and a predominantly red exterior shell, reminiscent of a stylized armored mask. The faceplate has angular eye openings and a pronounced jawline, giving it a bold, mechanical appearance. The red shell wraps around the sides and back, with visible panel lines and subtle weathering that suggest frequent use or exposure to harsh conditions. Circular details on each side resemble ear covers or audio components, and the surface finish is slightly worn, with scuffs and scratches adding to its rugged look. The helmet appears to be constructed from metal or a high-strength composite, with no visible ventilation or retention system. Its overall form is sleek and contoured, designed to fit closely around the head while providing full facial coverage.
description: A rugged, metallic helmet with an olive-green faceplate and a red, weathered shell, featuring angular eye openings and detailed panel lines.
description_view_0: Front view shows the olive-green faceplate with angular eye openings and a pronounced jawline, framed by the red shell.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the red shell, circular ear detail, and the transition between the red and green areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid red shell with visible panel lines and no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the red shell, circular ear detail, and the edge of the green faceplate.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a two-tone color scheme with an olive-green faceplate and a red shell, accented by black panel lines and weathering effects for a rugged, mechanical look. No additional graphics or motifs are present.
